raw_consumer_statement: I ordered a bike at XXXX on XX/XX/2024. XX/XX/XXXX they responded " Your order is on ithe way ''. On XX/XX/XXXX, I asked via email ( XXXX ) " Do you have a tracking number ''. No response from XXXX until XX/XX/XXXX were they replied they were apologizing for the delay and that my item ( bicycle ) had been dispatched to their courier. On XX/XX/XXXX, I responded to XXXX, " Hmmm. No tracking yet. '' On XX/XX/XXXX, I emailed XXXX  again, " So still no tracking number. It's looking like there never will be a tracking number. So unless I get it by today or at least the name of a courier, I will be calling my credit card company and dispute this charge ( Citi ). No response from XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, I emailed XXXX let them know that I notified Citi since XXXX  refused to provide the tracking number or the name of the courier. No response from XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX I emailed XXXX, " Since nothing has changed with my order, providing a tracking number/courier name, I am canceling order # XXXX, completed on XX/XX/2024 and request my {$98.00} payment for that order to be refunded to my credit card. '' No response from XXXX. On XXXX, I emailed XXXX, " Have you initiated my return yet? Not sure what you are waiting for. It's been 17 days since I ordered the bike and nothing yet. No courier name or tracking number since it was never sent to me. '' Again, no response from XXXX. I submitted a dispute with Citi and received a response back from Citi on XX/XX/XXXX saying they are reversing the condition credit and allowed me to continue the dispute. I sent Citi all of the emails explaining everything that I stated above. They add back the conditional credit of {$98.00}. On XX/XX/XXXX, Citi sent me a letter stating that they are working with the merchant ( XXXX  ) and their bank to get a permanent credit on my account and would let me know. Today, I received a letter dated XX/XX/XXXX that the dispute has been resolved and the customer is responsible. They took the easy way out after saying they are working on getting me a permanent credit 6 days earlier. I have every email I sent XXXX  and provided to Citi. Citi said they provided the responses from XXXX  regarding this dispute but I have never received them. Also, if you go to XXXX and click on " Visit our store ''. The next page says. " Something went wrong ''. " The store is unavailable ''. XXXX is a scam.
